title: Question: Correct usage of enumerated type methods

features.name: enum typedef with 10 values using first/next navigation methods
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with at least 10 values used with .first() and .next() navigation methods in sequential logic

features.name: enum method calls in always_ff block
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that calls enum methods .first() and .next() on a state variable for FSM state transitions
